summary: MIRA OS Iteration 166 - Complete onboarding flow, login, and admin panel testing. All 15 backend tests pass. Frontend flows work correctly on both mobile (390x844) and desktop (1920x800) viewports.

tests: test_user_login_success - User login with dipali@clubconcierge.in/test123 PASS
test_admin_verify - Admin Basic Auth verification PASS
test_create_pet_api - Pet creation requires auth PASS
test_pet_score_endpoint - Pet score for Mystique: 75% Soul Master PASS
test_full_onboarding_flow - Complete onboarding creates user and pet PASS
test_mira_chat_api - Mira chat responds correctly PASS

frontend_playwright.mobile_onboarding_step1: PASS - Pet parent form loads, fills, validates correctly (390x844)
frontend_playwright.mobile_onboarding_step2: PASS - Pet details form with mandatory soul fields works
frontend_playwright.desktop_onboarding_step1: PASS - Pet parent form works on desktop (1920x800)
frontend_playwright.desktop_onboarding_step2: PASS - Pet details with breed autocomplete works
frontend_playwright.user_login_mobile: PASS - Login with test credentials redirects to dashboard
frontend_playwright.admin_login_desktop: PASS - Admin login with aditya/lola4304 loads admin panel
frontend_playwright.admin_members_view: PASS - Pet Parent Directory shows 52 members
frontend_playwright.mira_demo_page: PASS - Mira Demo page loads after login with personalized content

onboarding_flow.step1_pet_parent: WORKS - Name, email, address, city, pincode, password, phone, whatsapp, terms, privacy
onboarding_flow.step2_pet_details: WORKS - Pet name, breed autocomplete, gender, dates, food allergies, health conditions, temperament, grooming tolerance
onboarding_flow.step3_celebrations: WORKS - Birthday, gotcha day celebration selection
onboarding_flow.form_validation: WORKS - Required fields validated, error messages shown

user_login.dashboard_content: Shows pets (Lola, Mystique, Bruno, Luna, Buddy, Meister, TestScoring), Paw Points (1670)

admin_panel.dashboard: Shows Today's Snapshot, Members & Pets, Commerce, 14 Pillars, Mira & AI, Marketing, Analytics, Content, Config tabs
admin_panel.members_view: Pet Parent Directory shows 52 pet parents with export CSV functionality

mira_demo.content: Shows pet-specific content (Lola the Maltese, Soul Score 20%)
mira_demo.features: Test Scenarios, Enhance Soul, Past Chats, Personalized reminders

api_endpoints.POST /api/membership/onboard: Creates user, pets, returns user_id, pet_ids, order_id

seed_data_creation: Created test users during onboarding flow tests (automatically cleaned/overwritten)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All onboarding, login, and admin flows working correctly. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_166_onboarding.py verify all APIs. Mira Demo page requires login to access. Pet Score API returns detailed score breakdown with tier information. Admin panel has comprehensive features across Members, Commerce, 14 Pillars, Mira & AI sections.
